title.zh: 自建应用反作弊治理项目

zh: 累计识别违规服务商820+家，违规企业52,683+家
实现30+模块的端到端自动化决策
月均收益246万元，年化收益超300万元
en: Accumulatively identified 820+ non-compliant service providers and 52,683+ non-compliant enterprises
Achieved end-to-end automated decision-making across 30+ modules
Monthly average revenue of 2.46 million RMB, annualized revenue exceeding 3 million RMB

description.zh: 企业微信生态安全的核心治理系统，通过多维度算法识别违规服务商和企业，实现端到端自动化决策。
description.en: A core governance system for WeCom ecosystem security, identifying non-compliant service providers and enterprises through multi-dimensional algorithms to achieve end-to-end automated decision-making.

highlights.zh: 多维度融合决策引擎实现年化收益超300万元。
highlights.en: Multi-dimensional fusion decision engine achieving annualized revenue exceeding 3 million RMB.

impact: 年化收益超300万元，累计识别违规服务商820+家、企业52,683+家
